full_text:
Xie Jing 謝旌
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xie Jing (謝旌). Duels Zhang Bao for 40 bouts before retreating. Described as brave, killed by Zhang Bao. Xie Jing was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Xie Jing lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
